creator: olivier@gid0.org
text:
The second patch should have been :

--- Makefile.old        2008-03-26 21:57:12.000000000 +0100
+++ Makefile    2008-03-26 21:56:09.000000000 +0100
@@ -45,6 +45,9 @@
 .endif

 post-patch:
+.if defined(WITHOUT_VORBIS)
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e '/LIBS+= -lvorbis/d' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
+.endif
 .if ${ARCH} != "i386"
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -Ee 's|^(NOASM =).*|\1 1|' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
 .endif
